globalPromptPrefix: Original limited-2D Berlin social-comedy frame, thick black outlines, simplified repeatable shapes, expressive eyebrows and body posture, dirty warm neutral palette with restrained neon accents, stable character identity and stable set geometry, one clear emotion and one clear visual gag, vertical 9:16 composition, clean frame without speech bubbles, readable text, logos or watermarks.
globalNegative: essential face inside bottom 14 percent subtitle safe area

panels.title: Ankunft vor Haus Nr. 13
panels.composition: Low street-level vertical establishing view. The worn five-floor facade dominates. Ricco is small in the lower third in front of the centered entrance, oversized backpack and headphones readable. Don Miau sits high on the fixed second-floor right ledge and is easy to miss at first glance. Keep the lower subtitle-safe zone free.
panels.promptTemplate: {{GLOBAL_PREFIX}} Use bound references {{CHAR_RICCO_SHA}}, {{CHAR_DON_MIAU_SHA}} and {{LOC_HAUS_FASSADE_SHA}}. {{COMPOSITION}} Ricco takes two tentative steps, backpack slightly bouncing. Don Miau remains almost motionless with only a minimal eye or head shift. Leave the metal house-number plaque blank for deterministic assembly overlay.
negativeAdditions: readable house number generated in image
motionPlan: slow push-in toward entrance and Ricco
final subtle reframing toward Don Miau
qa: entrance and window axes match location master
Ricco silhouette reads at mobile size

panels.title: Kein Mietverhältnis
panels.composition: Vertical medium two-shot in the narrow hall. Basti stands relaxed and slightly higher near the landing, one soft explanatory hand raised. Ricco stands lower with shoulders slightly drawn in, holding backpack strap or headphones. Basti's reusable cup and large key ring are clearly visible. Stair direction and doors match the flur master.
panels.promptTemplate: {{GLOBAL_PREFIX}} Use bound references {{CHAR_RICCO_SHA}}, {{CHAR_BASTI_SHA}} and {{LOC_FLUR_SHA}}. {{COMPOSITION}} Basti must look friendly rather than threatening. Ricco remains an adult newcomer, not a child. Abstract colored rule notes may appear only as unreadable shapes.
motionPlan: very slow lateral slide from Ricco toward Basti
small Ricco blink and shoulder lift
qa: stairs rise in the locked direction
Ricco and Basti identities match masters

panels.title: Die solidarischen 780

emotion.char_ricco: silent calculation and first real doubt
emotion.char_basti: sincere confidence in his own justification

panels.composition: Controlled half-close frame. Basti occupies the main upper area, leaning forward confidentially. The large key ring and reusable cup form a foreground power symbol. Ricco remains visible at the edge or opposite side with widening eyes and a brief frozen reaction. No number appears in the generated image.
panels.promptTemplate: {{GLOBAL_PREFIX}} Use bound references {{CHAR_RICCO_SHA}}, {{CHAR_BASTI_SHA}} and {{LOC_FLUR_SHA}}. {{COMPOSITION}} Preserve the exact hall geometry from panel_002. The comedy comes from Basti's warmth and Ricco's quiet reaction, not from exaggerated villain behavior.

panels.title: Zimmer-Reveal

emotion.char_ricco: disappointed but still too polite to explode

panels.composition: Vertical doorway reveal from just outside the south door looking north-west. Ricco is foreground or side-frame with oversized backpack nearly touching the doorway. The thin mattress stays on the west wall, window on the north wall, old radiator below it, west-wall crack and north-east desk visible. The room is tiny and damaged but not horror.
panels.promptTemplate: {{GLOBAL_PREFIX}} Use bound references {{CHAR_RICCO_SHA}} and {{LOC_RICCOS_ZIMMER_SHA}}. {{COMPOSITION}} Ricco takes a half-step in, backpack almost hits wall or frame, shoulders drop. Preserve empty lower subtitle area without hiding the floor-plan logic.
motionPlan: end on Ricco's face or frozen posture
qa: door south, window north, mattress west
subtitle does not cover room logic

panels.title: Telefonat mit Mutti

emotion.char_ricco: trying to sound optimistic, tired and slightly ashamed

panels.composition: Medium view from the south-east toward the west-wall mattress. Ricco sits or leans provisionally with phone at ear. Oversized backpack and blue Tupperware lid remain visible but secondary. The damaged wall, north window and small room geometry match panel_004.
panels.promptTemplate: {{GLOBAL_PREFIX}} Use bound references {{CHAR_RICCO_SHA}} and {{LOC_RICCOS_ZIMMER_SHA}}. {{COMPOSITION}} Ricco makes a slightly too-large reassuring smile while his eyes glance at the damaged room. One thumb touches the backpack strap or blue lid. No mother or additional character appears in frame.
qa: blue lid and backpack are secondary anchors

panels.title: Hausregeln im Flur
panels.composition: Vertical two-shot near the north-west notice wall. Basti stands beside many abstract colored paper shapes, presenting them with an open hand. Ricco is slightly behind and lower, following the gesture and then looking back. Stair and door geometry match panels 002 and 003. All paper remains unreadable.
panels.promptTemplate: {{GLOBAL_PREFIX}} Use bound references {{CHAR_RICCO_SHA}}, {{CHAR_BASTI_SHA}} and {{LOC_FLUR_SHA}}. {{COMPOSITION}} The wall feels bureaucratically overloaded without containing readable text. Basti's key ring remains consistent; Ricco retains backpack and headphones.
motionPlan: short pan across abstract note blocks

panels.title: Gemeinschaftsküchenlogik
panels.composition: Vertical medium-wide from the west doorway. Jule stands center-right and broad before the east-wall fridge, marker or tape clearly visible like an argument. Ricco stays smaller at the left edge and pulls his hand back from the fridge. The table, north sink and abstract fridge note zones follow the locked kitchen layout.
panels.promptTemplate: {{GLOBAL_PREFIX}} Use bound references {{CHAR_RICCO_SHA}}, {{CHAR_JULE_SHA}} and {{LOC_KUECHE_SHA}}. {{COMPOSITION}} Jule dominates by posture and spatial certainty, not by shouting. Keep her clothing non-glamorous and non-sexualized. Fridge labels are abstract color blocks only.
motionPlan: light push toward Jule and fridge

panels.title: Abendliches Urteil
panels.composition: Quiet night medium-wide from the south-west. Ricco sits on the west-wall mattress at left, adjusting headphones. Don Miau sits elevated at the north-east desk or router area with one paw on the important object. Their silhouettes remain separate. Window, mattress, desk, crack and cable match panels 004 and 005.
panels.promptTemplate: {{GLOBAL_PREFIX}} Use bound references {{CHAR_RICCO_SHA}}, {{CHAR_DON_MIAU_SHA}} and {{LOC_RICCOS_ZIMMER_SHA}}. {{COMPOSITION}} Use deep blue room shadow, small warm spill and restrained cyan router accent. Don Miau remains completely feline and silent, with a slow head turn or single tail flick implied. No human mouth shape or clothing.

renderAcceptance.finalDecision: Every panel remains REVIEW_REQUIRED until a human visual review and the episode QA gate are recorded.
